attributes.Sql Query:
SEL TRANSACTION_TYPE,RPO_FLG,UNBILLED_REVENUE_AMT ,PROCESSED_FISCAL_MTH ,FISCAL_MTH,SRC_ENTITY,SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
,PRODUCT_KEY ,SALES_ORDER_KEY ,SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ,WEB_ORDER_ID,BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY ,SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY ,SOLD_TO_CUST_ACCT_KEY
,END_CUSTOMER_KEY,SERVICE_FLG ,CORP_FLG,CONTRACT_START_DTM ,CONTRACT_END_DTM,CONTRACT_TERM ,CONTRACT_NUM,ERP_DEAL_ID ,AUTO_RELEASE_DT 
 ,FHI_BNI_FLG ,CISCO_BOOKED_DT ,ORACLE_BOOK_DTM ,PROCESS_DT,SCHEDULED_SHIP_DT,HOLD_FLG,EARLY_SHIP_FLG,SHIPPED_NOT_INVOICED_FLG,CUST_RQSTD_SHIPMENT_DT
,EDW_CREATE_DTM,EDW_CREATE_USER ,EDW_UPDATE_DTM,EDW_UPDATE_USER ,ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT_KEY,DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD,0 AS DV_TOTAL_SALES_VALUE_AMT
,DD_FB_TRXL_CURRENCY_CD,PL_CONVERSION_RATE ,DD_FB_SO_LINE_SRC_CREATE_DTM,DD_FB_PROMISED_TO_SHIPMENT_DT ,DD_FB_SS_CD ,DV_PROJECTED_CONTRACT_START_DT
,DV_PROJECTED_CONTRACT_END_DT,DV_CONTRACT_HEADER_START_DT ,DV_CONTRACT_HEADER_END_DT ,ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME ,DV_AR_ACCOUNTING_TERM_MTH_INT 
 ,DV_AVERAGE_TERM_MTH_INT,DV_AUTO_RELEASE_DT ,DV_WATERFALL_START_DT ,DV_WATERFALL_END_DT,DV_WATERFALL_TERM_DAYS_INT ,DV_REM_UNBILLED_REVENUE_AMT ,
DV_REM_TERM_MONTHS_CNT,CHANNEL_BOOKINGS_FLG, BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD AS DV_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD,DV_MILESTONE_START_DT,DV_MILESTONE_END_DT ,
 DV_ORDER_QUANTITY, DV_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT, DV_ATTRIBUTION_PCT, DV_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT,0 AS DV_BILLING_CYCLE_ID
,DV_CX_PRODUCT
,DV_RPO_ACTIVE_FLG 
FROM (

 SELECT 
 TRANSACTION_TYPE,RPO_FLG,CAST ((WF.WF_UNBILLED_REVENUE_AMT * CAST (COALESCE(ALLOCATION_PCT,1) AS DECIMAL(18,6))) AS DECIMAL (26,7)) AS UNBILLED_REVENUE_AMT ,PROCESSED_FISCAL_MTH ,FISCAL_MTH,SRC_ENTITY,SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
,WF.PRODUCT_KEY AS PRODUCT_KEY  ,SALES_ORDER_KEY ,SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ,WEB_ORDER_ID,BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY ,SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY ,SOLD_TO_CUST_ACCT_KEY
,END_CUSTOMER_KEY,SERVICE_FLG ,CORP_FLG,CONTRACT_START_DTM ,CONTRACT_END_DTM,CONTRACT_TERM ,CONTRACT_NUM,ERP_DEAL_ID ,AUTO_RELEASE_DT 
 ,FHI_BNI_FLG ,CISCO_BOOKED_DT ,ORACLE_BOOK_DTM ,PROCESS_DT,SCHEDULED_SHIP_DT,HOLD_FLG,EARLY_SHIP_FLG,SHIPPED_NOT_INVOICED_FLG,CUST_RQSTD_SHIPMENT_DT
,EDW_CREATE_DTM,EDW_CREATE_USER ,EDW_UPDATE_DTM,EDW_UPDATE_USER ,ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT_KEY,DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD,DV_TOTAL_SALES_VALUE_AMT
,DD_FB_TRXL_CURRENCY_CD,PL_CONVERSION_RATE ,DD_FB_SO_LINE_SRC_CREATE_DTM,DD_FB_PROMISED_TO_SHIPMENT_DT ,DD_FB_SS_CD ,DV_PROJECTED_CONTRACT_START_DT
,DV_PROJECTED_CONTRACT_END_DT,DV_CONTRACT_HEADER_START_DT ,DV_CONTRACT_HEADER_END_DT ,ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME ,DV_AR_ACCOUNTING_TERM_MTH_INT 
 ,DV_AVERAGE_TERM_MTH_INT,DV_AUTO_RELEASE_DT ,DV_WATERFALL_START_DT ,DV_WATERFALL_END_DT,DV_WATERFALL_TERM_DAYS_INT ,CAST ((WF.DV_REM_UNBILLED_REVENUE_AMT * CAST (COALESCE(ALLOCATION_PCT,1) AS DECIMAL(18,6))) AS DECIMAL (26,7)) AS DV_REM_UNBILLED_REVENUE_AMT,TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID
,(DV_REM_TERM_MONTHS_CNT/30.41667) AS DV_REM_TERM_MONTHS_CNT
,CHANNEL_BOOKINGS_FLG 
,ALCTN.BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD AS BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD,DV_MILESTONE_START_DT,DV_MILESTONE_END_DT,0 AS DV_ORDER_QUANTITY,0 AS DV_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT,  CAST((WF.DV_ATTRIBUTION_PCT * CAST (COALESCE(ALLOCATION_PCT,1) AS DECIMAL(18,6))) AS DECIMAL (18,8))AS DV_ATTRIBUTION_PCT,
CAST((WF.DV_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT * CAST (COALESCE(ALLOCATION_PCT,1) AS DECIMAL(18,6))) AS DECIMAL (18,6)) AS DV_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT, 0 AS DV_BILLING_CYCLE_ID
,COALESCE(RPFIN.DV_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID,'UNKNOWN') AS DV_CX_PRODUCT 
,DV_RPO_ACTIVE_FLG
FROM 
 $$STGDB.WI_UNB_REV_BSFT_WF_N WF
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RFM
	ON RFM.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT = WF.PROCESSED_FISCAL_MTH
   INNER  JOIN ( SELECT 
         DV_FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUM_INT, PRODUCT_KEY, BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_METRIC_CD, BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD, SUM(ALLOCATION_PCT) AS ALLOCATION_PCT  
         FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRDT_TO_PRDT_CLSFTN_ALCTN  WHERE  BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_METRIC_CD IN ('BOOKINGS','UNKNOWN')
         GROUP BY 1,2,3,4 HAVING SUM(ALLOCATION_PCT) <> 0
       --  QUALIFY RANK()  OVER (PARTITION BY DV_FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUM_INT,PRODUCT_KEY, BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_METRIC_CD  
         --    ORDER BY  BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD DESC  ) = 1
       ) ALCTN
    ON WF.ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT_KEY= ALCTN.PRODUCT_KEY    
	AND RFM.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT = ALCTN.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUM_INT

LEFT JOIN (SELECT ITEM_KEY,DV_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID,DIVESTITURE_TYPE_CD FROM 
 $$COMREFVWDB.R_PRODUCTS_FIN GROUP BY 1,2,3)RPFIN 
  ON RPFIN.ITEM_KEY=WF.ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT_KEY
 AND RPFIN.DIVESTITURE_TYPE_CD = 'UNKNOWN' 

)D  WHERE TRANSACTION_TYPE IS NOT NULL

SEL TRANSACTION_TYPE,RPO_FLG,UNBILLED_REVENUE_AMT ,PROCESSED_FISCAL_MTH ,FISCAL_MTH,SRC_ENTITY,SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
,PRODUCT_KEY ,SALES_ORDER_KEY ,SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ,WEB_ORDER_ID,BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY ,SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY ,SOLD_TO_CUST_ACCT_KEY
,END_CUSTOMER_KEY,SERVICE_FLG ,CORP_FLG,CONTRACT_START_DTM ,CONTRACT_END_DTM,CONTRACT_TERM ,CONTRACT_NUM,ERP_DEAL_ID ,AUTO_RELEASE_DT 
 ,FHI_BNI_FLG ,CISCO_BOOKED_DT ,ORACLE_BOOK_DTM ,PROCESS_DT,SCHEDULED_SHIP_DT,HOLD_FLG,EARLY_SHIP_FLG,SHIPPED_NOT_INVOICED_FLG,CUST_RQSTD_SHIPMENT_DT
,EDW_CREATE_DTM,EDW_CREATE_USER ,EDW_UPDATE_DTM,EDW_UPDATE_USER ,ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT_KEY,DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD,0 AS DV_TOTAL_SALES_VALUE_AMT
,DD_FB_TRXL_CURRENCY_CD,PL_CONVERSION_RATE ,DD_FB_SO_LINE_SRC_CREATE_DTM,DD_FB_PROMISED_TO_SHIPMENT_DT ,DD_FB_SS_CD ,DV_PROJECTED_CONTRACT_START_DT
,DV_PROJECTED_CONTRACT_END_DT,DV_CONTRACT_HEADER_START_DT ,DV_CONTRACT_HEADER_END_DT ,ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME ,DV_AR_ACCOUNTING_TERM_MTH_INT 
 ,DV_AVERAGE_TERM_MTH_INT,DV_AUTO_RELEASE_DT ,DV_WATERFALL_START_DT ,DV_WATERFALL_END_DT,DV_WATERFALL_TERM_DAYS_INT ,DV_REM_UNBILLED_REVENUE_AMT ,
DV_REM_TERM_MONTHS_CNT,CHANNEL_BOOKINGS_FLG, BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD AS DV_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD,DV_MILESTONE_START_DT,DV_MILESTONE_END_DT ,
 DV_ORDER_QUANTITY, DV_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT, DV_ATTRIBUTION_PCT, DV_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT,DV_BILLING_CYCLE_ID
 ,DV_CX_PRODUCT,DV_RPO_ACTIVE_FLG
FROM (
 SELECT 
 TRANSACTION_TYPE,RPO_FLG,CAST ((WF.WF_UNBILLED_REVENUE_AMT * CAST (COALESCE(ALLOCATION_PCT,1) AS DECIMAL(18,6))) AS DECIMAL (26,7)) AS UNBILLED_REVENUE_AMT ,PROCESSED_FISCAL_MTH ,FISCAL_MTH,SRC_ENTITY,SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
,WF.PRODUCT_KEY AS PRODUCT_KEY  ,SALES_ORDER_KEY ,SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ,WEB_ORDER_ID,BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY ,SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY ,SOLD_TO_CUST_ACCT_KEY
,END_CUSTOMER_KEY,SERVICE_FLG ,CORP_FLG,CONTRACT_START_DTM ,CONTRACT_END_DTM,CONTRACT_TERM ,CONTRACT_NUM,ERP_DEAL_ID ,AUTO_RELEASE_DT 
 ,FHI_BNI_FLG ,CISCO_BOOKED_DT ,ORACLE_BOOK_DTM ,PROCESS_DT,SCHEDULED_SHIP_DT,HOLD_FLG,EARLY_SHIP_FLG,SHIPPED_NOT_INVOICED_FLG,CUST_RQSTD_SHIPMENT_DT
,EDW_CREATE_DTM,EDW_CREATE_USER ,EDW_UPDATE_DTM,EDW_UPDATE_USER ,ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT_KEY,DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD,DV_TOTAL_SALES_VALUE_AMT
,DD_FB_TRXL_CURRENCY_CD,PL_CONVERSION_RATE ,DD_FB_SO_LINE_SRC_CREATE_DTM,DD_FB_PROMISED_TO_SHIPMENT_DT ,DD_FB_SS_CD ,DV_PROJECTED_CONTRACT_START_DT
,DV_PROJECTED_CONTRACT_END_DT,DV_CONTRACT_HEADER_START_DT ,DV_CONTRACT_HEADER_END_DT ,ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME ,DV_AR_ACCOUNTING_TERM_MTH_INT 
 ,DV_AVERAGE_TERM_MTH_INT,DV_AUTO_RELEASE_DT ,DV_WATERFALL_START_DT ,DV_WATERFALL_END_DT,DV_WATERFALL_TERM_DAYS_INT ,CAST ((WF.DV_REM_UNBILLED_REVENUE_AMT * CAST (COALESCE(ALLOCATION_PCT,1) AS DECIMAL(18,6))) AS DECIMAL (26,7)) AS DV_REM_UNBILLED_REVENUE_AMT,TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID
,(DV_REM_TERM_MONTHS_CNT/30.41667) AS DV_REM_TERM_MONTHS_CNT
,CHANNEL_BOOKINGS_FLG 
,ALCTN.BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD AS BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD,DV_MILESTONE_START_DT,DV_MILESTONE_END_DT,0 AS DV_ORDER_QUANTITY,0 AS DV_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT,  CAST((WF.DV_ATTRIBUTION_PCT * CAST (COALESCE(ALLOCATION_PCT,1) AS DECIMAL(18,6))) AS DECIMAL (18,8))AS DV_ATTRIBUTION_PCT,
CAST((WF.DV_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT * CAST (COALESCE(ALLOCATION_PCT,1) AS DECIMAL(18,6))) AS DECIMAL (18,6)) AS DV_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT,DV_BILLING_CYCLE_ID
,COALESCE(RPFIN.DV_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID,'UNKNOWN') AS DV_CX_PRODUCT 
,DV_RPO_ACTIVE_FLG
FROM 
 $$STGDB.WI_UNB_REV_BSFT_WF_Y WF
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RFM
	ON RFM.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT = WF.PROCESSED_FISCAL_MTH
   INNER  JOIN ( SELECT 
         DV_FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUM_INT, PRODUCT_KEY, BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_METRIC_CD, BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD, SUM(ALLOCATION_PCT) AS ALLOCATION_PCT  
         FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRDT_TO_PRDT_CLSFTN_ALCTN  WHERE  BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_METRIC_CD IN ('BOOKINGS','UNKNOWN')
         GROUP BY 1,2,3,4 HAVING SUM(ALLOCATION_PCT) <> 0
       --  QUALIFY RANK()  OVER (PARTITION BY DV_FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUM_INT,PRODUCT_KEY, BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_METRIC_CD  
         --    ORDER BY  BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD DESC  ) = 1
       ) ALCTN
    ON WF.ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT_KEY= ALCTN.PRODUCT_KEY    
	AND RFM.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT = ALCTN.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUM_INT
LEFT JOIN (SELECT ITEM_KEY,DV_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID,DIVESTITURE_TYPE_CD FROM 
 $$COMREFVWDB.R_PRODUCTS_FIN GROUP BY 1,2,3)RPFIN 
  ON RPFIN.ITEM_KEY=WF.ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT_KEY
 AND RPFIN.DIVESTITURE_TYPE_CD = 'UNKNOWN' 

)D  WHERE TRANSACTION_TYPE IS NOT NULL
